The '''''Star Wars Visual Dictionaries''''', also referred to as the '''Star Wars Visual Guides''' are a series of hardcover reference books published by [[Dorling Kindersley|DK Publishing]] that detail various individuals, locations, and items in the ''[[Star Wars]]'' franchise from both [[canon]] and [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]].

==Media==
===Installments===
====Canon====
*''[[Star Wars Rebels: The Visual Guide]]'' — [[July 21]], [[2014]]
*''[[Star Wars Rebels: Visual Guide: Epic Battles]]'' — [[October 6]], [[2015]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: The Visual Dictionary]]'' — [[December 18]], [[2015]]
*''[[Star Wars: Rogue One: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' – [[December 16]], [[2016]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Visual Encyclopedia]]'' – [[April 4]], [[2017]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Last Jedi: The Visual Dictionary]]'' – [[December 15]], [[2017]]
*''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story The Official Guide]]'' – [[May 25]], [[2018]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary, New Edition]]'' – [[September 18]], [[2018]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker: The Visual Dictionary]]'' – [[December 20]], [[2019]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' – [[July 1]], [[2021]] {{C|cancelled}}
*''[[Star Wars: Dawn of Rebellion: The Visual Guide]]'' – [[November 2]], [[2023]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Acolyte: The Visual Guide]]'' – [[June 15]], [[2025]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Visual Guide]]'' – [[April 2]], [[2026]]

====Legends====
*''[[Star Wars: The Visual Dictionary]]'' — [[October 5]], [[1998]]
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary]]'' — [[September 15]], [[1999]]
*''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Visual Dictionary]]'' — [[April 23]], [[2002]]
*''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary]]'' — [[April 2]], [[2005]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' — [[October 6]], [[2005]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary]]'' — [[September 25]], [[2006]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Special Edition]]'' — [[May 3]], [[2007]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: The Visual Guide]]'' — [[July 26]], [[2008]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Visual Guide: Ultimate Battles]]'' — [[August 17]], [[2009]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: New Battlefronts: The Visual Guide]]'' — [[August 30]], [[2010]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]'' — [[January 26]], [[2012]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Updated and Expanded]]'' — [[April 30]], [[2012]]
*''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Ultimate Illustrated Guide|Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]'' — [[June 25]], [[2013]] {{C|cancelled}}
*''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]'' — [[September 30]], [[2013]] {{C|cancelled}}

====Canon & Legends====
*''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary (2016)|Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary]]'' — [[2016]]

====LEGO====
*''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Visual Dictionary]]'' — [[October 10]], [[2009]]
*''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Visual Dictionary: Updated and Expanded]]'' — [[June 10]], [[2014]]
*''[[LEGO Star Wars Visual Dictionary, New Edition]]'' — [[April 2]], [[2019]]
*''[[LEGO Star Wars Visual Dictionary Updated Edition]]'' — [[April 2]], [[2024]]
